demo.title: defi-monitor.sh
demo.code:
# Run the configured watchlist
aeon-defi-monitor

# Alert when health factor on Aave drops below 1.5
# (set per-entry in watchlist YAML)
#   alert_health_factor_floor: 1.5

setup: Configure the watchlist YAML — pool/market addresses, thresholds, optional position address
Set `BANKR_API_KEY` if you want Submit payloads attached to alerts
